text: Contractor hereby assigns to Company all right, title and interest in and to any work product created under this Agreement.
The parties will discuss ownership of any resulting work product at a later date.
Contractor will develop deliverables developed hereunder for Company's internal use.
note: Positive example means the IP-generating-activity signal is present; whether it is actually a risk depends on whether an ownership assignment exists elsewhere, which is what RULE_OWNERSHIP_UNDEFINED checks for.

text: Contractor will provide monthly status reports to Company.
